info.name: Service Finder API - Complete Collection
info.description: Complete and comprehensive API collection for Service Finder application with ALL endpoints including staff, conversations, and enhanced features

request.description: Register a new user. Roles: customer, company, staff, admin
Request password reset code via email
Verify the reset code sent to email
Get all users with pagination and filters (Admin only)
Update user status (Admin only). Values: active, suspended, banned
Get all service types under a category
Get service type details by slug
Get all companies with pagination and filters
Get company with services, reviews, and staff
Get companies offering specific service type

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Clean Pro Services",
  "description": "Professional cleaning company with 10 years of experience",
  "registrationNumber": "REG123456",
  "address": "123 Main St, Suite 100",
  "city": "New York",
  "latitude": "40.7128",
  "longitude": "-74.0060",
  "phone": "+1234567890",
  "email": "contact@cleanpro.com",
  "logoUrl": "https://example.com/logo.jpg",
  "coverImageUrl": "https://example.com/cover.jpg",
  "establishedYear": 2015,
  "cardHighlights": ["Fast Service", "24/7 Available", "Insured"],
  "detailHighlights": ["Eco-friendly Products", "Licensed & Insured", "100% Satisfaction"]
}

request.description: Get all services offered by a company

body.raw:
{
  "companyId": 1,
  "serviceTypeId": 1,
  "name": "Standard House Cleaning",
  "image": "https://example.com/cleaning.jpg",
  "description": "2-3 hour complete house cleaning service",
  "basePrice": 99.99,
  "features": ["Vacuum all rooms", "Mop floors", "Dust surfaces", "Clean bathrooms"],
  "durationMin": 120,
  "durationMax": 180
}

request.description: Get bookings with filters based on user role

body.raw:
{
  "serviceId": 1,
  "companyId": 1,

  "scheduledTime": "10:00",
  "notes": "Please call 15 minutes before arrival",
  "address": "789 Customer Ave, Apt 5B, New York, NY 10001"

request.description: Update booking status. Values: pending, confirmed, in_progress, completed, cancelled
Assign staff member to booking (Company admin)
Get bookings assigned to current staff member
Mark job as started, sets actualStartTime (Staff)
Create Stripe checkout session for card payment
Complete payment with cash or wallet. Methods: cash, wallet
Get all reviews for a company
Get reviews for a specific staff member

body.raw:
{
  "bookingId": "{{bookingId}}",
  "companyRating": 5,
  "companyComment": "Excellent service! Very professional and thorough.",
  "staffRating": 5,
  "staffComment": "The cleaning staff was very friendly and efficient."
}

item.name: 👷 Staff Management
item.description: Staff availability, bookings, and service approval

request.description: Get current staff member's availability slots
Get pending service requests awaiting staff approval
Get bookings for current staff member
Get all conversations for current user
Get messages from a specific conversation
Check if API server is running
